channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Taylor Swift and Lainey Wilson Surprise Duet ‘Love Story’ at Travis Kelce’s NFL Concert
item.description: 🎶 Taylor Swift + Lainey Wilson team up for epic ‘Love Story’ duet at Travis Kelce’s NFL bash! 🎤💫 #MusicCollabGoals

item.title: AC/DC to Power Up Tour Dates With Special Pop-Up Shops
item.description: 🎸 AC/DC bringing the thunder to your city with exclusive pop-up shops! Rock out and snag some merch! ⚡ #ACDC #RockOn

item.title: Yard Act share “New Beginnings” from upcoming album, add tour dates around Riot Fest
item.description: Yard Act drops groove-worthy track “New Beginnings” and tour dates! Let's dance our way to Riot Fest! 🎶🕺 #YardAct #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Might Just Sing ‘Landslide’ With Stevie Nicks at Daisy Chain Fields
item.description: 🌟 Olivia Rodrigo + Stevie Nicks = Epic duet in the making at Daisy Chain Fields! 🎤✨ #MusicLegends #DreamCollab

item.title: Brandon Flowers Announces First Solo Album in 11 Years
item.description: 🌟 Brandon Flowers is back with new solo beats! 🎶 Get ready to dance like it's 2009! 💃 #BrandonFlowers #NewMusicAlert
